test_name: March 2025 International Form D SAT Math Module 1
passage: In one week in 2017, a technician earned a total of 716 by working at her regular job and at a second job doing part-time work, The equation 20 h + 14 e = 716 represents this situation, where h is the number of hours worked at her regular job and c is the number of hours worked at her second job, which of the following is the best interpretation of 20 in this context?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The amount, in dollars, the technician earned for each hour she worked at her regular job

choices.label: B
choices.text: The amount, in dollars, the technician earned for each hour she worked at her second job

choices.label: C
choices.text: The number of hours the technician worked in one week at her regular job

choices.label: D
choices.text: The number of hours the technician worked in one week at her second job
